zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ruggles Sr於大約1591年7月8日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利時，他的父親Thomas Ruggles33歲，母親Magery Danridge29歲。他於大約1624年與Barbara Bridge在英國艾可納結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。他去世於1663年10月在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年72歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ruggles Sr于大约1591年7月8日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利时，他的父亲Thomas Ruggles33岁，母亲Magery Danridge29岁。他于大约1624年与Barbara Bridge在英国艾可納结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。他去世于1663年10月在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年72岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Ruggles Sr was born about 8 July 1591, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Ruggles, was 33 and his mother, Magery Danridge, was 29. He married Barbara Bridge about 1624, in Nazeing, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. He died in October 1663, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 72, and was buried in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ruggles Sr est né environ 8 juillet 1591, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Ruggles, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Magery Danridge, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Bridge environ 1624, à Nazeing, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Il est décédé en octobre 1663, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Ruggles Sr um 8. Juli 1591 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ruggles 33 und seine Mutter Magery Danridge 29. Er hat um 1624 in Nazeing, Essex, England Barbara Bridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er ist 1635 nach Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb im Oktober 1663 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ruggles Sr è nato il circa 8 luglio 1591 nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Ruggles, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Magery Danridge, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Bridge circa 1624, nel Nazeing, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì nel ottobre 1663, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ruggles Srが約1591年7月8日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Rugglesは33歳，母Magery Danridgeは29歳であった。約1624年にイギリスエセックスナズエイングでBarbara Bridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに移住した。彼は1663年10月にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロクスブリーで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ruggles Sr(이)가 대략 1591년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ruggles(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Magery Danridge(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1624년 영국 에세스 나즈인그에서 Barbara Bridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1663년 10월 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ruggles Sr nasceu aproximadamente 8 de julho de 1591, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Ruggles, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Magery Danridge, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Bridge aproximadamente 1624, em Nazeing, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1663, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ruggles Sr родился около 8 июля 1591 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Ruggles было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Magery Danridge, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Bridge около 1624 г. в местности назинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Он умер октябрь 1663 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Ruggles Sr nació aproximadamente 8 de julio de 1591, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Ruggles, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Magery Danridge, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Barbara Bridge aproximadamente 1624, en Nazeing, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió en octubre de 1663, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
